title: StageExecutor.historyMatches: compare timestamps using .Equal
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

As the time package warns us, we should have used `time.Time.Equal()` to compare timestamps in image histories when checking for equality, instead of trying to compare values using the `==` operator.

#### How to verify it

Check if we can evaluate caches for images with non-UTC ("Z") `Created` values in history entries.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

As of this writing, `docker.io/shanemcd/ansible-runner` is such an image, causing cache evaluation to fail to match anything based on it.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
No
```

comments.body: One question and unhappy tests, otherwise LGTM.
